questionHtml:
The density of an ideal gas is 1.4 kg m−3 when its pressure is 0.1 MPa.

What is the average translational speed of the gas molecules?


A.  0.46 m s−1

B.  270 m s−1

C.  460 m s−1

D.  71 km s−1

meta.title: The density of an ideal gas is 1.4 kg m−3 when its pressure is 0.1 MPa. What is the average translational speed of the gas molecules? A. 0.46 m s−1 B. 270 m s−1 C. 460 m s−1 D. 71
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
B. The particulate nature of matter
